channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overgrown hedge blocking the pavement, 9th April
item.description:
Hedge off 123 wells way is overgrown and blocks the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wells Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture pieces left on pavement, 9th April
item.description:
These pieces of furniture were left on the pavement for over 4 days. Please collect these and hold the people responsible to account. I suspect these are coming from some of the neighbouring houses on rainbow road or the flats above the pub. This happens every other week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Set of Corner Shelves Dumped on Pavement, 9th April
item.description:
A unwanted set of corner shelves has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 87. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 9th April
item.description:
An item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 89. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress and Domestic Rubbish Dumped by Electric Sub-Station, 9th April
item.description:
A large unwanted mattress and domestic rubbish has been left dumped in front of the Electric Sub-Station. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
